AI Readiness Survey
Step 1 of 9 · ~7 min
01 / 09
What type of business do you run?
Select the option that best describes your primary business model.
Service-Based Business (agency, consulting, coaching)
Healthcare / Medical (home health, clinic, therapy)
Real Estate (agent, investor, property management)
Retail / E-Commerce (online store, local retail)
Construction / Trades (contractor, landscaping, HVAC)
Restaurant / Food Service
Tax Service Agency (tax prep, bookkeeping, CPA)
Professional Services (law, finance, accounting)
Other / Not Listed
02 / 09
How many people currently work in your business?
Include full-time employees, part-time staff, and regular contractors.
Solo — Just Me (the true solopreneur)
2–5 People (small but mighty)
6–15 People (growing team)
16–30 People (established operation)
31–50 People (scaling business)
50+ People (enterprise territory)
03 / 09
What software does your business currently use?
Check all that apply — be honest, even if the answer is "nothing."
04 / 09
How many hours per week do you or your team spend on tasks that could be automated?
Think: answering the same questions, scheduling appointments, follow-ups, posting on social media, data entry.
20 hours/week
2 hrs30 hrs60+ hrs
05 / 09
What are your biggest operational pain points right now?
Select your top 3 — be honest, this is where your score comes from.
06 / 09
How comfortable are you with using AI and automation in your business?
There's no wrong answer — this helps us calibrate the right deployment level for you.
Beginner — I've heard of ChatGPT but haven't really used AI in my business
Curious — I've played around with a few AI tools but nothing systematic
Intermediate — I use some AI tools regularly but want to go deeper
Advanced — I have automations running but need a complete, integrated system
Skeptical — I'm not fully convinced yet, but open to seeing the ROI
07 / 09
How urgently do you want to get your AI system deployed?
This helps us prioritize your strategy call booking.
ASAP — I needed this yesterday, ready to move immediately
Within 30 Days — Making a decision this month
1–3 Months — Still researching and planning
3–6 Months — Building toward it, no rush
Just Exploring — Not ready yet but want to understand
08 / 09
What is your current annual business revenue?
This helps us right-size the ROI conversation and recommend the right tier. Your data is confidential.
Under $50K / year — Early stage
$50K – $150K / year — Getting established
$150K – $500K / year — Growing steadily
$500K – $1M / year — Strong business
$1M – $5M / year — Scaling operation
$5M+ / year — Enterprise level
Prefer not to say
09 / 09
What is your revenue goal for the next 12 months?
Final question! This powers your AI Readiness Score and recommendation.
2× my current revenue — I want to double it
Reach $100K – $250K
Reach $250K – $500K
Reach $500K – $1M
Break $1M for the first time
Scale to $5M or beyond
I want stability and time back more than growth
--
Calculating...

Built for your industry →

Custom AI Solutions for Every Industry

Our AI Army adapts to your specific business needs. Whether you need 24/7 customer service, lead qualification, appointment scheduling, or operational automation, we build custom AI agents trained on your processes, your voice, and your industry knowledge.

Universal Lead Management

Instant response to inquiries across all channels. AI qualifies leads, answers questions, and books appointments while you focus on closing deals.

24/7 Customer Support

Never miss a customer question again. AI handles FAQs, troubleshooting, order status, and escalates complex issues to your team with full context.

Review & Reputation Management

Automatically request reviews from happy customers, respond to feedback, and monitor your online reputation across all platforms.

Appointment & Scheduling

AI coordinates your calendar, handles rescheduling, sends reminders, and reduces no-shows without human intervention.

Social Media Automation

Consistent posting, engagement responses, and content generation based on your brand voice and industry trends.

Data & Analytics

Real-time dashboards showing KPIs, conversion rates, customer behavior, and actionable insights to grow your business.

Healthcare & Medical Practices

HIPAA-compliant AI solutions designed for medical practices, dental offices, physical therapy clinics, and healthcare providers who need to streamline patient communication and reduce administrative burden.

Patient Appointment Scheduling

AI handles appointment booking, rescheduling, cancellations, and sends automated reminders to reduce no-shows by up to 40%.

Insurance Verification Pre-Check

Collect insurance information upfront and verify coverage details before appointments to reduce billing issues.

Patient Intake Automation

Digital intake forms sent automatically, medical history collection, and consent document management before the appointment.

Follow-Up Care Coordination

Automated post-visit check-ins, prescription reminders, treatment plan follow-ups, and referral coordination.

Review Request Automation

Strategically timed review requests to satisfied patients to build your online reputation and attract new patients.

FAQ & Education

AI answers common patient questions about procedures, preparation instructions, office policies, and insurance coverage.

Common Use Cases

  • Dental practices reducing front desk workload by 60% with AI appointment scheduling
  • Physical therapy clinics automating insurance pre-checks and patient intake
  • Primary care offices using AI to triage non-urgent patient questions
  • Specialty practices improving patient retention with automated follow-up care
  • Medical spas streamlining consultation bookings and treatment education

Real Estate Agencies & Agents

Dominate your market with AI that qualifies leads, schedules showings, follows up with prospects, and keeps your pipeline full while you focus on closing deals and building relationships.

Instant Lead Response

AI responds to Zillow, Realtor.com, and website leads within 60 seconds, qualifying prospects and booking showing appointments automatically.

Showing Coordination

Automated scheduling, calendar coordination with multiple parties, and reminder messages for buyers, sellers, and agents.

Lead Nurturing Campaigns

Multi-month drip campaigns with market updates, new listings, and personalized property recommendations based on buyer preferences.

Open House Management

Pre-registration, text reminders, digital sign-in, and automated follow-up with every attendee.

Seller Lead Qualification

AI conducts initial conversations with potential sellers, collects property details, and qualifies motivation before your listing appointment.

Transaction Updates

Keep clients informed at every stage with automated milestone updates, document requests, and closing coordination.

Common Use Cases

  • Solo agents managing 40+ active buyers without an assistant
  • Teams converting 3× more Zillow leads with instant AI response
  • Luxury brokerages providing white-glove service at scale
  • Property management companies automating tenant inquiries and showings
  • Commercial agents nurturing long-cycle prospects with consistent touchpoints

Security & Protection Services

AI-powered lead response and client management for alarm companies, security guard services, locksmith businesses, and surveillance installation companies.

Emergency Response Triage

AI qualifies urgent service requests, dispatches appropriate teams, and provides immediate response protocols to clients.

Quote & Consultation Booking

Automated discovery questions about property size, current security setup, and needs assessment before scheduling on-site evaluations.

Contract Renewal Management

Proactive outreach before contract expiration, renewal incentive communication, and seamless contract signing.

Installation Scheduling

Coordinate complex multi-day installations, manage technician calendars, and send preparation instructions to clients.

Service Call Automation

Route maintenance requests, troubleshoot common system issues, and schedule service appointments based on technician availability and location.

Monitoring Alert Follow-Up

Automated client communication after system alerts, false alarm reduction, and documentation for insurance and compliance.

Common Use Cases

  • Alarm companies reducing response time to inbound leads from hours to seconds
  • Security guard services automating shift scheduling and client check-ins
  • Locksmith businesses handling after-hours emergency requests
  • Surveillance installation companies qualifying leads and booking site assessments
  • Access control providers managing complex enterprise client communications

Restaurants & Food Service

Front-of-house AI that handles reservations, takeout orders, catering inquiries, and customer questions so your staff can focus on delivering exceptional dining experiences.

Reservation Management

AI handles table bookings via phone, text, and social media, manages waitlists, and sends confirmation and reminder messages.

Takeout & Delivery Orders

Process orders via SMS and phone, answer menu questions, provide order status updates, and handle special requests.

Catering & Events

Qualify large party inquiries, collect event details, provide pricing estimates, and coordinate with your events team.

Menu & Allergen Information

Instantly answer questions about ingredients, preparation methods, dietary restrictions, and allergen information.

Review & Feedback Management

Request reviews from satisfied diners, respond to online feedback, and alert management to negative experiences in real-time.

Loyalty & Promotions

Automated birthday messages, special occasion outreach, loyalty program management, and promotional campaign distribution.

Common Use Cases

  • Fine dining establishments managing complex reservation requests during peak hours
  • Quick-service restaurants handling high-volume takeout orders via text
  • Catering companies qualifying corporate event inquiries and booking tastings
  • Multi-location chains standardizing customer communication across all sites
  • Food trucks collecting pre-orders and managing location-based customer updates

Skilled Trades & Home Services

Purpose-built for plumbers, electricians, HVAC contractors, roofers, and home service businesses that need to capture every lead, book more jobs, and keep customers informed.

Emergency Service Dispatch

AI triages urgent vs. routine requests, collects job details, and routes to available technicians based on location and specialty.

Estimate & Inspection Booking

Qualify service requests, gather property information, schedule on-site assessments, and send pre-visit preparation instructions.

Job Status Updates

Automated "on our way" messages, arrival time updates, work completion notifications, and invoice delivery.

Seasonal Maintenance Campaigns

Proactive outreach for HVAC tune-ups, gutter cleaning, winterization, and recurring maintenance service reminders.

Payment & Invoice Follow-Up

Automated invoice delivery, payment reminders, and integration with your accounting systems for seamless collections.

Warranty & Service Plans

Track warranty expirations, promote maintenance plans, and manage service agreement renewals automatically.

Common Use Cases

  • HVAC companies booking 40% more maintenance plans during seasonal campaigns
  • Plumbing services responding to emergency calls 24/7 without after-hours staff
  • Electrical contractors qualifying commercial project leads before site visits
  • Roofing companies following up with storm-damaged property owners at scale
  • General contractors managing multiple subcontractor schedules and client updates

Professional Services & Consulting

Designed for law firms, accounting practices, consultants, and professional service providers who need intelligent intake, client communication, and practice management automation.

Client Intake & Qualification

AI conducts initial consultations, collects case details, checks conflicts, and qualifies prospects before attorney review.

Consultation Scheduling

Automated calendar coordination, conflict checking, client preparation materials, and video conferencing link delivery.

Document Collection

Request, track, and follow up on required documents, contracts, tax records, and client-provided information.

Case Status Updates

Proactive client communication about milestones, upcoming deadlines, court dates, and next steps in their matter.

Billing & Time Tracking

Invoice delivery, payment reminders, trust account notifications, and integration with practice management software.

Referral Network Management

Route cases outside your practice area to trusted partners and maintain referral relationships automatically.

Common Use Cases

  • Personal injury law firms qualifying accident victims and scheduling case reviews
  • Family law practices managing high-volume consultation requests during initial filing
  • Tax preparation services handling seasonal inquiry spikes during filing deadlines
  • Business consultants nurturing prospects through multi-month sales cycles
  • Financial advisors managing client check-ins and annual review scheduling

E-Commerce & Online Retail

AI-powered customer service, order management, and retention marketing for online stores that need to scale support without scaling headcount.

Order Status & Tracking

Automated responses to "Where is my order?" inquiries with real-time tracking information and delivery estimates.

Product Recommendations

AI analyzes customer behavior and purchase history to suggest relevant products via email, SMS, and chat.

Returns & Exchanges

Process return requests, generate shipping labels, track refund status, and handle exchange coordination automatically.

Abandoned Cart Recovery

Multi-channel follow-up with personalized incentives, product questions answered, and seamless checkout completion.

Inventory Notifications

Back-in-stock alerts, pre-order management, and waitlist coordination for high-demand products.

Customer Win-Back Campaigns

Re-engage inactive customers with personalized outreach, special offers, and new product introductions.

Common Use Cases

  • Shopify stores reducing customer service response time from 24 hours to 60 seconds
  • Subscription box companies automating renewal reminders and customization changes
  • Fashion retailers recovering 25% of abandoned carts with AI follow-up
  • B2B suppliers managing complex wholesale order inquiries and quote requests
  • Dropshipping businesses handling international customer inquiries across time zones
The Problem
The Real Problem

Most Businesses
Are Built to Fail

Not because the owner isn't capable. Not because the idea isn't good. Because the systems, the staffing, and the intelligence to scale simply aren't there — and by the time owners realize it, they're already buried.

20%
Fail in Year One
50%
Gone by Year Five
65%
Don't Survive 10 Years
82%
Fail Due to Cash Flow
82%
of small businesses fail
due to cash flow & operations
The Root Cause

The Owner Is
The Bottleneck

You're the CEO, the sales team, the customer service rep, the social media manager, the bookkeeper, and the janitor. There is no delegation. There is no system. There is only you — and you are finite.

You're not failing because you're not working hard enough. You're failing because no human can scale a business alone — and hiring is expensive, unreliable, and slow.

The businesses that survive aren't the ones with the best ideas. They're the ones with the best operating systems.

68%
of business owners work
50+ hours per week
The Silent Killer

Leads Fall Through
Every Single Day

79% of leads are lost because no one followed up fast enough. A lead contacted within 5 minutes is 9× more likely to convert than one called an hour later.

But you're busy. Your team is busy. That lead texts once, gets no reply, and books your competitor. This is happening right now, today, in your business.

5 Minutes
The window to capture a lead before they move on
79%
of leads lost due to
slow follow-up
The Data Gap

You Can't Scale
What You Can't See

If you asked your team right now: "What is our customer acquisition cost? What is our lead-to-close rate? What percentage of customers refer others?" — could anyone answer?

Most business owners are flying blind. You want to grow, but you don't know where the ceiling is, where the leaks are, or which activities actually move the needle. You can't fix what you can't measure.

Know Their Actual KPIs
12%
Consistent Lead Follow-Up
21%
Documented SOPs
9%
Using a CRM
34%
Any AI in Place
17%
The Competitive Reality

AI Isn't Waiting
For You to Catch Up

GPT-4. GPT-4o. Voice AI. Agents. Autonomous systems. Every six months the landscape is unrecognizable — and every six months, your competitors who are keeping up pull further ahead.

The businesses adopting AI automation right now aren't doing it because they love technology. They're doing it because their competitor already has an AI answering the phone at midnight and following up 90 seconds after a lead comes in.

You don't have 200 hours to research and test every new tool. You have a business to run. The companies that win are the ones who hire someone who already knows what works — and just deploys it for them.

6mo
AI evolves faster than
you can keep up
The Real Problem

Most Businesses
Are Built to Fail.

Not because the owner isn't capable. Not because the idea isn't good. Because the systems, the staffing, and the intelligence to scale simply aren't there — and by the time owners realize it, they're already buried.

82%
of small businesses fail due to cash flow and operational problems

The U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics reports that approximately 20% of businesses fail in year one. By year five, that number climbs to nearly 50%. By year ten? Over 65% are gone. The common thread isn't the market. It's the operator being unable to run a business and grow one at the same time.

The Root Cause

The Owner Is the Bottleneck

In most small businesses, the owner is simultaneously the CEO, the sales team, the customer service rep, the social media manager, the bookkeeper, and the janitor. There is no delegation. There is no system. There is only you — and you are finite.

You are not failing because you are not working hard enough. You are failing because no human being can scale a business alone — and hiring humans is expensive, unreliable, and slow. The businesses that survive aren't the ones with the best ideas. They're the ones with the best operating systems.

😤
68%
of owners work 50+ hours per week

The Overworked Owner & Stretched C-Suite

You didn't start a business to work harder than anyone who works for you. But here you are — responding to customer complaints at 11pm, writing your own social posts at 6am, and handling a scheduling crisis during lunch. Your genius is being buried under menial tasks that a trained AI could handle in seconds. You're the CEO, the operator, and the bottleneck — all at once.

79%
of leads are lost due to slow follow-up

Leads Fall Through Every Day

The average business loses 79% of its leads because no one followed up fast enough. Research shows that a lead contacted within 5 minutes is 9× more likely to convert than one called an hour later. But you're busy. Your team is busy. That lead texts once, gets no reply, and books your competitor. This is happening right now, today, in your business.

91%
of SMBs have no documented KPIs

You Can't Scale What You Can't See

If you asked your team right now — "What is our customer acquisition cost? What is our lead-to-close rate? What percentage of customers refer others?" — could anyone answer? Most business owners are flying blind. You want to grow, but you don't know where the ceiling is, where the leaks are, or which of your activities actually move the needle. You can't fix what you can't measure.

73%
of SMB owners say staffing is their #1 challenge

Understaffed, Undertrained, Overwhelmed

You can't afford a full team. The people you can afford take months to train, make mistakes for the first year, and then leave. Small businesses are chronically understaffed — and the staff they do have spend most of their time on tasks that don't require a human: answering the same questions, moving appointments, sending follow-up emails. Your headcount issue isn't a people problem. It's a systems problem.

5×
faster — AI evolves every 6 months

AI Is Moving Faster Than You Can Keep Up

GPT-4 came out. Then GPT-4o. Then voice AI. Then agents. Then autonomous systems. Every six months the landscape is unrecognizable — and every six months, your competitors who are keeping up pull further ahead. You don't have 200 hours to research and test every new tool. You have a business to run. The companies that win are the ones who hire someone who already knows what works — and just deploys it for them.

62%
of business owners identify as non-technical

Technology Is a Wall, Not a Door

You've tried setting up a CRM. It took days and you never finished. You've tried creating automations. Half of them break and you don't know why. You've tried AI tools. They gave you generic output that didn't sound like you at all. Technology that should be working for you is instead creating more work. The promise of AI is real — but only when it's implemented by someone who actually knows how to configure it for a specific business like yours.

The Average Owner's Day — Unfiltered

This is what running a business without systems actually looks like, hour by hour.

7:00 AM
Check & reply to overnight messages
"45 minutes answering questions that your AI could have handled at 2am."
9:00 AM
Schedule appointments manually
"Back-and-forth texts and calls to confirm, reschedule, and follow up — for 3 bookings."
11:00 AM
Chase invoice payments
"Uncomfortable reminder emails to clients who are 2 weeks late. Your automation should be doing this."
1:00 PM
Post on social media
"Stare at a blank screen for 20 minutes, post something mediocre, wonder why engagement is low."
3:00 PM
Handle a customer service issue
"A problem that should have been caught automatically. Instead, it escalated until the client was upset."
5:00 PM
Follow up on leads from this week
"Three of them already booked elsewhere. Two stopped responding. One converts — after 4 touchpoints."
7:00 PM
Data entry & reporting
"Manually updating spreadsheets that should be updating themselves. Every single week."
Every Day — With AI Army
Work on the business, not in it
AI answers messages, books appointments, follows up on leads, posts content, handles customer service, and sends review requests — around the clock, without you.

Every Business Wants to Scale.
Almost None Know Their Numbers.

Growth without data is guessing. And most small business owners are guessing every single day. They don't know their customer acquisition cost. They don't know their lead-to-close rate. They don't know where revenue is actually coming from. They make decisions based on instinct — and instinct isn't scalable.

You cannot know your capacity for growth without knowing your current efficiency. You cannot fix your funnel if you don't know where it leaks. You cannot scale a team if you don't know what each role actually produces.

  • What is your customer lifetime value? Most owners guess within 40% of the actual number.
  • What % of your leads convert to clients? Industry average is 2–5%. Are you above or below?
  • What is your cost per lead by channel? Without this, you're spending blind.
  • What is your revenue per employee or per hour? This tells you your real capacity ceiling.
  • What is your churn rate? Acquiring new clients while losing old ones is a leaky bucket.
  • What tasks consume the most time with the least revenue impact? That's your automation target list.
How Most SMBs Rate Themselves
Knowing Their Actual KPIs12%
Consistent Lead Follow-Up21%
Documented SOPs & Processes9%
Actively Using a CRM34%
Any AI or Automation in Place17%
Social Media Posting Consistently28%

Survey data from SCORE, HubSpot, Salesforce SMB Research, and U.S. Small Business Administration reports on SMB operational practices, 2023–2024.

AI Isn't Waiting for You
to Catch Up.

The businesses adopting AI automation right now aren't doing it because they love technology. They're doing it because their competitor already has an AI answering the phone at midnight and following up 90 seconds after a lead comes in.

Every month you wait is a month of leads going cold, reviews not getting requested, appointments not getting confirmed, and social media going silent. AI doesn't take days off. It doesn't call in sick. It doesn't need two weeks of onboarding. It deploys — and it runs.

You don't need to understand how it works. You just need someone to build it for you. That's exactly what we do.

AI vs. Manual — Response Speed
AI Army ResponseUnder 90 seconds · 24/7 · Consistent
Manual Response4+ hours avg · Business hours · Variable
AI Follow-UpInstant trigger · Never forgets · Sequenced
Human Follow-UpWhen remembered · Often skipped · Inconsistent
AI Review RequestAuto-sent post-service · Every time · Tracked
Manual Review AskAwkward · Forgotten · Inconsistent
The Turning Point

You Don't Need More Hours.
You Need a Better Army.

Every problem above has the same solution: a complete AI operating system, built around your specific business, that handles the work you shouldn't be doing — so you can finally focus on the work only you can do. That's what the AI Army is. That's what we build.

Capabilities

Everything Your
Business Needs.

Six core pillars, built to interlock. Each one engineered specifically around your industry, your workflow, and your business model — not a template, not a demo.

01 / 06

SOP Setup

Your entire business systematized and documented — so nothing lives inside your head and every process runs without you. Onboarding, fulfillment, customer flows, team handoffs. All of it, organized and searchable.

Process DocsPlaybooksWorkflowsTemplates
02 / 06

CRM Configuration

A fully configured CRM tailored to your sales cycle, lead volume, and customer journey — with pipelines, automated follow-ups, and booking flows built from day one so zero leads fall through the cracks.

Sales PipelinesLead CaptureAuto Follow-UpFunnels
03 / 06

Spreadsheet Systems

Custom-built data infrastructure that tracks what matters — revenue, leads, KPIs, operations. Built to feed decision-making with clean data and automated reporting, not manual entry.

KPI DashboardsRevenue TrackingPipeline DataAuto Reports
04 / 06

Industry-Trained AI Agents

AI agents that know your business, your customers, and your industry — calibrated to your brand voice, your niche, and your specific products or services. Not generic. Not borrowed. Yours. Scalable up to 50 agents.

Custom TrainingBrand VoiceNiche KnowledgeUp to 50 Agents
05 / 06

Full Business Automation

Hands-off operations end to end. AI answers your phones, replies to texts, manages your calendar, requests Google Reviews, handles reschedules, manages customer support, and posts on every social platform — all without you touching it. Your AI Army posts from your recorded content, manages inboxes across email, social, and phone, and grows your brand on autopilot.

AI Phone AnsweringSMS AutomationGoogle ReviewsCalendar & BookingsCustomer SupportSocial PostingInbox ManagementEmail Automation

06 / 06 — Website + Social Presence

A full AI-powered website built in a matter of days — designed to convert, built to rank. Add social media profile buildout and your AI Army handles content posting, inbox management, and brand growth across every platform automatically.

The Knowledge Engine

Our Commitment

The Rara Avis Promise.

We don't just deliver and disappear. Every deployment comes backed by guarantees that actually mean something.

30

30-Day "We Fix It" Warranty

If anything we built isn't performing as promised within 30 days of delivery, we fix it — no questions, no fees, no runaround. If it's broken, that's our problem to solve.

Guaranteed Fix · 30 Days
1Y

Automatic Updates Warranty

AI moves fast. Your system won't fall behind. 6-month or 1-year automatic updates keep your agents, automations, and integrations current — without you touching anything.

6-Month or 1-Year Coverage
WK

Weekly & Monthly Insider Newsletters

Exclusive Rara Avis newsletters — weekly tactical updates and monthly deep-dives on AI trends, growth strategies, and automation wins. Content you won't find anywhere else.

Weekly + Monthly Drops
DC

Private Owner's Discord

An exclusive Discord with other AI Army owners — share wins, swap strategies, access insider tutorial videos, and get early access to new capabilities before anyone else.

Exclusive Access · Owners Only
After Deployment

You're Not Alone
After Launch.

Every AI Army owner joins something bigger — a network of operators sharing real intelligence, strategy, and growth.

The AI Army Owners Discord

A private, exclusive community for every business owner who deploys their AI Army. This is where the real conversations happen.

  • Real-time tips and wins from other owners
  • Exclusive insider strategy drops from our team
  • Tutorial videos and training walkthroughs
  • Early access to new AI capabilities and updates
  • Direct line to the Rara Avis team for questions
  • Industry-specific channels by business type
Always On

Insider Newsletters

"Most AI vendors sell you software.
We build you a complete operating system —
then train it to think like the best minds in your industry."

— Rara Avis Marketing LLC  ·  AI Automation Division

How It Works

From Zero to
Fully Deployed.

A battle-tested five-phase deployment process. Precision-built, custom-calibrated, handed off ready to run.

Phase 01
Discovery & Business Audit

We go deep into your business — workflows, pain points, revenue drivers, customer journey, and growth goals. This is a custom blueprint, not a template. We learn your business before we build anything.

Strategy CallBusiness IntakeKPI MappingIndustry Analysis
→
Phase 02
Infrastructure Build

Your entire business operating system is constructed — SOPs documented, CRM configured, data systems built, and every system connected to work together — tailored to your specific business model.

SOP SetupCRM ConfigSpreadsheet SystemsData Architecture
→
Phase 03
Agent Training & Deployment

Each agent is trained on the 200+ book knowledge foundation, then fine-tuned with your industry, brand voice, and customer language. Your AI workforce learns your business before facing a single customer.

AI TrainingIndustry CalibrationBrand VoiceQA & Testing
→
Phase 04
Automation Integration

Every automation is wired, tested, and refined — phone answering, SMS sequences, email flows, review requests, bookings, social posting. You review, we refine, until every touchpoint runs exactly right.

Phone AISMS / EmailGoogle ReviewsBooking FlowsSocial Automation
→
Phase 05
Handoff, Dashboard & Scale

You receive your command dashboard — a central view of every agent, automation, and metric. We walk through everything live. You go operational the same day. Scale to 50 agents as your business grows.

Dashboard WalkthroughOwner TrainingScalability Roadmap
→
200+

The Foundation No Other Agency Has

Every agent we build stands on a knowledge base built from over 200 of the world's most powerful business, sales, marketing, leadership, and growth books. Not summaries. Deep, embedded intelligence that shapes how each agent thinks, communicates, and solves problems for your business.

Fractional Leadership

Your Chief AI Officer.

Every high-performing business needs strategic AI leadership at the top. Not just tools — a mind that understands where AI is going, how to apply it to your specific business, and how to make sure you never fall behind.

Fractional CAIO

What Is a Chief AI Officer?

A Chief AI Officer (CAIO) is the executive responsible for your organization's entire artificial intelligence strategy — from identifying automation opportunities, to selecting the right tools, to training your team, to measuring ROI, to ensuring your brand stays ahead of every curve.

Most companies can't afford a full-time CAIO. Salaries for qualified AI executives range from $250K–$500K+ annually. We give you the same strategic intelligence, direction, and execution — fractionally, at a fraction of the cost — deployed directly into your business from day one.

Our Fractional CAIO service isn't a monthly check-in call. It's an active, ongoing operating relationship where we sit inside your business strategy and ensure your AI infrastructure keeps compounding as your business grows.

$400K+
Avg. Full-Time CAIO Salary
10×
Workforce Scale Goal
200+
Books in Our AI Knowledge Base
24/7
AI Systems Running for You

AI Strategy & Roadmap

We map your 12-month AI roadmap — every tool, every agent, every integration — sequenced for maximum impact and minimum disruption. You don't have to figure out what to do next. We tell you.

Technology Evaluation & Selection

The AI landscape changes every 90 days. We evaluate, test, and select the right platforms for your stack so you're never running outdated tools — and never paying for platforms you don't need.

Systems Integration & Oversight

Every AI tool, automation, and agent in your business is monitored, optimized, and kept current. If something drifts or a platform changes its API, we catch it and fix it before you even notice.

KPI Tracking & AI ROI Reporting

You get monthly AI performance reports — leads contacted, hours saved, reviews generated, bookings automated, response times — so you can see exactly what your AI Army is producing in dollars and time.

Team Training & AI Literacy

As you grow and bring on team members, we train them on your AI systems — so your people amplify the automation instead of working around it. Your team becomes AI-native, not AI-resistant.

Growth Scaling & New Capabilities

When you're ready to scale — new markets, new services, new channels — your CAIO activates the next layer of your AI infrastructure. The army grows with you, up to 50 agents and beyond.

Traditional Visibility

SEO — Search Engine Optimization

Your Chief AI Officer ensures your business is fully optimized for every traditional search engine — so when a customer Googles your service, your business appears at the top. We build your SEO infrastructure into your website, your content, and your review strategy — not as an afterthought, but as a foundational layer of your AI Army deployment.

  • On-page technical SEO built into every website we deploy
  • Schema.org structured data for rich Google results
  • Google Review automation to build your local authority
  • Content strategy that compounds organic traffic month over month
  • Local SEO optimization for service-area businesses
  • Keyword mapping aligned to your specific industry and geography
The New Frontier

AIEO — AI Engine Optimization

Search is changing forever. When someone asks ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, or Claude "what's the best [your service] in [your city]?" — is your business the answer they get? AIEO is the practice of optimizing your brand, content, and digital presence specifically to appear in AI-generated responses — and your CAIO makes sure you're ahead of every competitor on this new frontier.

  • Brand authority signals that AI models recognize and cite
  • Structured content formatted for AI knowledge extraction
  • FAQ and expertise content that trains AI models about your business
  • Citation and mention strategy across authoritative digital sources
  • E-E-A-T optimization (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trust)
  • Ongoing monitoring of how AI models represent your brand

Ready for Your Chief AI Officer?

Let's talk about what Fractional CAIO services look like for your specific business — the strategy, the cadence, the deliverables, and what your AI-powered business looks like 12 months from now.

Book a CAIO Strategy Call →
